author: gartung
body: This takes the json output of edmModuleEventAllocMonitorAnalyze.py and writes out a circles formatted json file. [Example output](https://gartung.web.cern.ch/circles/web/piechart.php?colours=default&data_name=data&dataset=step3-moduleEventAllocMonitor.circles&groups=packages&local=false&resource=AvgTempSize&show_labels=true&show_animations=true&threshold=0)
title: Perftools/AllocMonitor: add script to generate module event alloc monitor circles json file.
